name: Turkey Stuffing
recipeIngredient: 12 bread cubes, stale, cut in 1/2 inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil, shallot, onion, and celery in a heavy pot. Saute until the vegetables begin to soften. Add bread cubes, sage, marjoram, thyme, celery seed, paprika, and pepper to taste. Mix well. Cook, stirring frequently, for 5 minutes over medium-low heat.
2. Add hot vegetable stock to the pot and mix well. Cover and cook over low heat for 30 minutes or longer, stirring frequently, until bread cubes have broken down. (The secret to a good stuffing is in the slow cooking and the frequent stirring.)
